vBRIEFInfo.author: panopticon-cli/0.0.0
vBRIEFInfo.description: Plan for PAN-596: Allow editing a conversation title

narratives.Problem: Conversation titles can only be renamed via curl. Backend PATCH /api/conversations/:name already exists and marks title_source='manual', but there is no UI.
narratives.Proposal: Add inline rename UI in the ConversationList sidebar rows and the ConversationPanel header. Pencil icon button toggles an input; Enter saves, Esc cancels, blur saves. React-query mutation invalidates ['conversations'] for instant UI update. No backend changes.

items.title: Add updateConversationTitle API helper and mutation hook

narrative.Action: In src/dashboard/frontend/src/components/MissionControl/ConversationList.tsx add an exported async helper updateConversationTitle(name, title) that calls PATCH /api/conversations/:name with JSON body { title }, encoding name via encodeURIComponent. Add a useMutation wiring in both ConversationList and ConversationPanel that invalidates queryKey ['conversations'] on success.

subItems.title: PATCH /api/conversations/:name is called with { title: trimmed } and encoded name
Successful rename invalidates the conversations query so UI updates immediately
Empty/whitespace title does not call the API; original title is restored

items.title: Inline rename UI in ConversationList sidebar rows

narrative.Action: In ConversationList.tsx add a pencil icon button (lucide-react Pencil) beside the existing Archive/Copy/Stop actions. Clicking it (stopPropagation) puts the row into edit mode: replace the .conversationName span with an <input> autofocused and text-selected. Enter saves, Esc cancels, blur saves. Add matching styles in styles/mission-control.module.css for .conversationEditBtn and .conversationNameInput.

subItems.title: Pencil icon button visible on each conversation row with aria-label 'Rename <name>'
Clicking pencil does not select the conversation; clicking input does not either
Enter saves and exits edit mode; Esc cancels and reverts; blur saves if non-empty
Input autofocuses and pre-selects the current title when entering edit mode

items.title: Inline rename UI in ConversationPanel header

narrative.Action: In src/dashboard/frontend/src/components/chat/ConversationPanel.tsx add a pencil icon button next to the title at line 120 ({conversation.title ?? conversation.name}). Import the updateConversationTitle helper from ConversationList. Wire a useMutation that invalidates ['conversations']. Same Enter/Esc/blur behavior. Add styles in the chat module CSS.

subItems.title: Pencil button next to the panel title; click enters edit mode with autofocused input
Enter/Esc/blur behavior matches the sidebar implementation
After save, both the panel header and the sidebar row reflect the new title without manual refresh

items.title: Verify title_source transitions to 'manual' and blocks AI override

narrative.Action: Manually verify: create a conversation, let AI generate a title (title_source='ai'), rename via the new UI, confirm the DB row is updated to title_source='manual' and that subsequent generateAiTitle calls in src/dashboard/server/routes/conversations.ts do not overwrite the manual title. No backend code changes needed — this is a verification task.

subItems.title: After user rename, conversations.title_source column equals 'manual' in SQLite
Subsequent AI title generation for the same conversation is a no-op (confirmed via logs or code path)
